ddt:Target.Name: CONNECT420_E044_00.00.22.ddt
ddt:Target.Description:
The diagnostic variant "E041" is created for the first FUP3-SW for VAN model lines VS11 and VS30. It is based on diagnostic variant "C5_E041b" from ECU "IC177" and includes the following adaptions:
- Deactivating of all IC-only services
- Adding of VAN-specific variant codings (incl. VS11-specific parameters)
- Adding of REN part numbers for VS11

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter

Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Test.Description: An internal control unit reset was performed.
The protection of the battery discharge is activated.
The protection of the battery discharge is activated. (There is a invalid signal).
The maintenance program variant is unknown.
The maintenance program data is implausible.
The maintenance program data is implausible (a wrong or incompatible configuraiton was detected).
The radio antenna 1 has malfunction (there is a general electrical error).
The radio antenna 1 has malfunction (there is a interruption).
The radio antenna 2 has malfunction (there is a general electrical error).
The radio antenna 2 has malfunction (there is a interruption).
The microphone 1 has malfunction. (There is a general electrical error).
The microphone 2 has malfunction. (There is a general electrical error).
The loudspeaker channel 1 has malfunction. (There is a general electrical error.)
The loudspeaker channel 2 has malfunction. (There is a general electrical error.)
The loudspeaker channel 3 has malfunction. (There is a general electrical error.)
The loudspeaker channel 4 has malfunction. (There is a general electrical error.)
The loudspeaker channel 5 has malfunction. (There is a general electrical error.)
The bluetooth/WLAN-antenna has malfunction (there is a general electrical error).
The USB-Connection 1 has malfunction. (There is a general electrical error).
The USB-Connection 2 has malfunction. (There is a general electrical error).
The amplifier in the Audio or COMAND has a malfunction. (Over Temperature)
The LVDS-Line between the Instrument Cluster and Head-Up-Display has malfunction (General Electric Failure).
Production mode is activated.
The output for the speakers 'instrument cluster center' has malfunction. (General Electric Failure)
Antenna test active
The telltale 'Trailer' has malfunction (System Internal Failures).
An incorrect variant coding of Tuner was detected.
The telltale 'Suspension' has malfunction (there is a internal error)
The vehicle data for the activation of the system is not available.
The vehicle for the activation of the system is not available or wrong.
The activation of the system failed.
One or more speakers on the subwoofer amplifier 1 have malfunction (there is a general electrical error).
Software tampering was detected. (System Internal Failure)
An Internet connection could not be established.
An Internet connection could not be established due to a certificate error.
The event memory has malfunction. (The system function is restricted).
The external subwoofer amplifier 1 has malfunction. There is an open load.
The external subwoofer amplifier 1 has malfunction. (Tere is an internal component error).
Control unit "Audio or COMAND" has a malfunction.
The telltale 'ESP' has malfunction (there is a internal error).
The telltale 'ESP OFF' has malfunction (there is a internal error).
The telltale 'ABS' has malfunction (there is a internal error).
The yellow telltale 'Service Brake' has malfunction (a internal error is present).
The red telltale 'Service Brake' has malfunction (there is a internal error).
The telltale 'SRS' has malfunction (there is a internal error)
The yellow telltale 'Parking Brake' has malfunction (a internal error is present).
The red telltale 'Parking Brake' has malfunction (there is a internal error).
The telltale 'Direction Indicator Left' has malfunction (there is a internal error).
The telltale 'Direction Indicator Right' has malfunction (there is a internal error).
The telltale 'Electric System' has malfunction (there is a internal error).
The power supply in the system is too low (there is a signal below the valid limit value).
The power supply in the system is too high (there is a signal above the valid limit value).
The power supply is too low (the limit value of the electrical voltage is fallen below).
The power supply is too high (the limit value of the electrical voltage is exceeded).
The HSVL-line between the instrument cluster and the display group has malfunction (a general electrical error is present).
A internal error in the instrument cluster is available (there is a internal component error).
The travel authorization data is implausible (the component is not activated).
The travel authorization data is implausible (a wrong or incompatible configuration was detected).
The watchdog function has detected an internal software error.
The value of the total distance is not plausible (there is a invalid signal).
The value of the total distance is not plausible (the signal comparison is faulty).
The value of the total distance is not plausible (the signal is not plausible).
The value of the total distance is not plausible (missing message).
The communication with the user interface CAN bus has malfunction (Bus Off).
The communication with the ECU 'Combustion Engine' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Transmission' has malfunction (there is a implausible signal).
The communication with the ECU 'Transmission' has malfunction.
The communication with the ECU 'Fuel Pump' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Powertrain' has malfunction (there is a implausible signal).
The communication with the ECU 'Powertrain' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Traction Control System' has malfunction (there is a implausible signal).
The communication with the ECU 'Traction Control System' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the Tire Pressure Control has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Power Steering' has malfunction (there is a invalid signal).
The communication with the ECU 'Power Steering' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Suspension' has malfunction (there is a implausible signal).
The communication with the ECU 'Suspension' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the signal detection and Control Module front has malfunction (there is a implausible signal).
The communication with the signal detection and Control Module front has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the signal detection and Control Module rear has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the Multifunctional ECU has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Audio or COMMAND' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the Supplemantal Restraint System (SRS) has malfunction (there is a implausible signal).
The communication with the Supplemantal Restraint System (SRS) has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the PARKTRONIC has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the Air-Conditioner has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the Electric Ignition Switch has malfunction (there is a implausible signal).
The communication with the Electric Ignition Switch has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Rear Door Left' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Rear Door Right' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Front Door Left' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Front Door Right' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Inductive Charging' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the Column Tube module has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the Trailer-Connect-Device has malfunction (a implausible signal is present).
The communication with the Trailer-Connect-Device has malfunction (missing message).
Communication with the telematics CAN bus has a malfunction. (Bus OFF)
The communication with the ECU ''Mercedes-Benz Intelligent Drive'' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the reversible Belt Pretensioner front left has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the reversible Belt Pretensioner front right has malfunction (missing message).
Communication with the Audio/COMAND operating unit has a malfunction. (missing message)
Communication with the control unit ''Mobile phone cradle'' has a malfunction. (missing message)
The communication with the ECU for telematics services has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Sound Generator For Electic Vehicle' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the ECU 'Displaygroup' has malfunction (there is a general electrical error).
The communication with the ECU 'Display Group' has malfunction (the signal comparison is incorrect).
The communication with the ECU 'Displaygroup' has malfunction (missing message).
The communication with the Blind-Spot-Assist has malfunction (missing message).
